creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
These error messages show up when I log in at the console:

   FreeBSD/i386 (tethys.csudh.edu) (ttyv0)
   login: trevor
   Feb 19 22:21:07 tethys login: unable to dlopen(/usr/lib/pam_unix.so)
   Feb 19 22:21:07 tethys login: [dlerror: /usr/lib/libutil.so.3: Undefined symbol "freeaddrinfo"]
   Feb 19 22:21:07 tethys login: adding faulty module: /usr/lib/pam_unix.so
   Feb 19 22:21:07 tethys login: auth_pam: Module is unknown
   Password:

In spite of the messages, I am able to log in.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: 
Install from
ftp://ftp.cdrom.com:/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/4.0-20000214-CURRENT/install-i386.iso
then log in at the console.
